# Syed Mohamad Arif - Portfolio

> Frontend & Mobile Developer based in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia. Creator of Hikayat Daily Global app. 4+ years of experience building high-performance mobile apps with React Native, TypeScript, and modern web technologies.

## About

Syed Mohamad Arif is a dedicated Frontend & Mobile Developer specializing in React Native for mobile apps and React for web platforms. He works across the full product lifecycle — from UI/UX design and prototyping to development, testing, and deployment. Skilled in Git, CI/CD, and Agile practices.
